caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black and blue baseball cap, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a bracelet on his right wrist. The background is a white wall featuring yellow text that reads "GRIND HUSTLE" accompanied by black stars. Overlaid graphics on the screen include a logo on the left that says "STUDIO PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". The man's t-shirt features the partial text "CHECK I... AN". Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his right hand. He begins with his arm extended and hand open, gradually bringing his hand closer to his chest and then lowering it as he continues to speak, maintaining a focused expression while looking toward someone off-screen.
